name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Real Shot M11745 White] This zippy wallet is made of soft Mahina calfskin and embellished with an exquisite Monogram perforated pattern. The wallet features a secure full-zip design, with an organized interior featuring multiple pockets, compartments, and a business card slot. Additionally, the wallet can be carried as a clutch. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width) C
